message:
refactor(tools): extract try_dispatch_archive_write with WBQ fallback

Consolidate the repeated WBQ enqueue + match pattern into a shared
try_dispatch_archive_write helper that falls back to write_op_sync
when the queue is unavailable. All reservation archive write call
sites (create, release, renew, force-release) and message archive
writes now use this single path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
